step_rationale: Glucocorticoid elevated post-MI; reflects HPA-axis activation and systemic inflammatory response.
mechanism: Cortisone elevation post-myocardial infarction marks acute stress-hormone response and immunosuppressive regulation.

references.title: Impact of myocardial revascularization surgery on the plasma metabolome.
references.journal: Metabolomics : Official journal of the Metabolomic Society
